subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls who have drawn nigh unto the Threshold of the Most High! Your missive hath reached us, and from its contents there hath been wafted the utmost fragrance of joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه مقرب درگاه کبریا نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت روح و ریحان رخ داد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
